treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 2 PUFF inhalation every 4 hours as needed for wheezing
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient reported some improvement in shortness of breath.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 500 mg on arrival, then 250 mg PO daily for one dose

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with dyspnea, suspected COPD exacerbation.
Patient received DuoNeb and azithromycin treatment.
Patient reported improvement in shortness of breath.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with PCP as soon as possible; recommended follow up X-ray in 6 weeks.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Unable to rule out lung cancer; further evaluation recommended.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient ambulated independently, mental status clear.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient declined most treatment and requested discharge.
